title: HUNTA-830 "My body is hot ~ I feel like I want to have sex ..." With my boss's wife who sneaked into my futon, I thought it was useless, but I had a thick close contact SEX in the futon!
description: After having a drinking party with my drunken boss, I decided to get rid of the last train and stay overnight when I went home. My boss's wife is a former senior of my company. My feelings burned up to my senior (boss's wife) who I still admire. Do you know my feelings ... At midnight when I fell asleep, my boss's wife suddenly came into the futon and had close contact sex in the futon. If I put out my hand, it's a dangerous opponent, but I can't stop it anymore!
